resources.string: A controller-first shell-style launcher for Android handhelds and TV devices

Since this is your first run, this is how you can interact with this launcher 
 
 Touch : 
- Executing Item : Tap the icon of the item 
- Changing between Categories : Swipe left or right 
- Changing between Items : Swipe up or down 
- Show / Hide Item Options : Two-fingers tap anywhere 
- Re-reveal the Menu : Tap anywhere on screen 
 
 Keyboard / TV Remote : 
- Executing Item : Enter / OK Button 
- Changing between Categories : Arrow Left and Right 
- Changing between Items : Arrow Up and Down 
- Show / Hide Item Options : Tab Button / Menu Button (Right side of Spacebar) 
- Re-reveal the Menu : Enter 
- Jump to item by first letter : Any alphanumeric key 
 
 Diamond-Button Controller: 
- Executing Item : Cross / Circle Button (Depending on setting) 
- Changing between Categories : D-Pad Left and Right 
- Changing between Items : D-Pad Up and Down 
- Show / Hide Item Options : Triangle Button 
- Re-reveal the Menu : Start 
 
 Xbox Controller: 
- Executing Item : A / B Button (Depending on setting) 
- Changing between Categories : D-Pad Left and Right 
- Changing between Items : D-Pad Up and Down 
- Show / Hide Item Options : Y Button 
- Re-reveal the Menu : Menu 
 
 If "Mimic Non-Asian Console" option is active, diamond-button and Xbox-style controllers 
 will use Cross / A Button to as confirm, otherwise it will use Circle / B Button
Storage permission is not granted, players may not usable
If new item is not added automatically.
Tap anywhere to reveal menu once it\'s hidden
Lists all music in device via Android MediaStore
No … You shouldn\'t launch this item
Add music to your device to see it here.
Add videos to your device to see them here.
Add photos to your device to see them here.
Cannot find \"market:\" URL handler, Do your device have any App Market installed? e.g Google Play Store
Shortcut is only supported from Android O and later
Choose the navigation and body style used by the launcher
Show currently connected network name, it can be Ethernet, Wi-Fi or Mobile Data
Show the hand for second to on the analog clock
Show rendering performance of the launcher
Show the hidden development/debug settings entry

Portrait screen may cause bad rendering performance on lower device and high RAM usage due to more icon is visible on-screen at the same time. In case it happens, you can enforce the launcher orientation to landscape.

PHOTOSENSITIVE EPILEPSY 
IF YOU HAVE A HISTORY OF EPILEPSY OR SEIZURES, CONSULT A DOCTOR BEFORE USE, CERTAIN PATTERN MAY TRIGGER SEIZURES WITH NO PRIOR HISTORY, BEFORE USING THIS LAUNCHER, CAREFULLY READ THE INSTRUCTION MANUAL HOSTED AT GITHUB. 
 
THIS APP IS NOT AN EMULATOR! 
THIS APP IS A SHELL-STYLE LAUNCHER, NOT A GAME CONSOLE EMULATOR. IF YOU INSTALLED IT EXPECTING AN EMULATOR, YOU CAN UNINSTALL IT. 
 
THIS WARNING CAN BE DISABLED FROM SYSTEM MENU
What the Circle Button (B on Xbox, A on Nintendo) do on system
An error occurred during custom font loading : %s
Install static shortcuts to Cross Launcher
View is not hardware accelerated, rendering performance might be slower. On some device, you can enforce HW acceleration via Developer Option, either for a specific app or system-wide.
Wi-Fi, mobile, data usage, and hotspot
Adjust notification access for all apps
Change apps that can notify even when do not disturb is active
Display language, number formatting, input system
Sent force stop request to Android System : %s
Activate Cross Launcher until launcher next restart
Go to Settings to active Cross Launcher
An error occurred when launching App Market
That epilepsy and seizure message at cold boot screen
Disables launcher from loading and playing a video icon
Open settings to set the Wave Wallpaper as the current wallpaper
Use the wave in the launcher itself, for devices without direct Live Wallpaper support.
Adjust style, speed and color of the wave
Changing the usage of Internal Wave Layer requires the launcher to be rebooted. Would you like to change the value and reboot launcher?
This device probably didn\'t support live wallpaper
Wave Wallpaper is not currently active, Preview will not available.
Touch screen : Use Swipe to change values, items and pages
Which console button to display on-screen
Dimming level of the menu underlay

:: Formatting Guide ::
 Every text inside of bracket will be substituted with corresponding text
 For example, "-( {operator} {sdf:dd/MM hh:mm:ss a} )-" will be formatted as "-( HardBanks 28/2 10:54:39 AM )-"
 
 :: Supported Substituted Keys ::
 • {operator} -> Show currently active network name (Data Operator, Wi-Fi, Ethernet)
 • {sdf:[format]} -> Java Simple Date Format
 — This key need to have the actual SimpleDateFormat source format, e.g : "{sdf:dd/MM/yyyy}"
 — this will be formatted and printed like for example "28/2/2022", for possible combinations
 — please visit : https://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/text/SimpleDateFormat.html
 • {charging} -> If is plugged in, will be substituted with lightning emoji
 • {battery} -> Battery Percentage (0-100), percent sign not included
 • {battery_f(:[decimal])} -> Battery Percentage in float (0.0-100.0), percent sign not included
 — The decimal part is optional, it expects number that sets how many digits behind comma
Format of text displayed on status bar (if visible)
Play gameboot animation when launching application
Find in this Category (clear to cancel search)
Rearrange horizontal items in CrossLauncher main menu
Set resolution for drawing and then scaled to device screen
Do not show status bar at top-right portion of screen
Show hidden apps, disabled on next restart
Tools to rebuild libraries and reset customizations
Re-scan Music, Video, and Photo folders
Drop all cached icons and backdrops (may cause temporary flickering)
Reset this app\'s category and node overrides
File type mismatch, not XPKG file

This app is targeted to users who have perfect and partial vision. we do not provide any additional accessibility feature for visually impaired user, So please exit the app immediately and uninstall this app if you think it is unnecessarily installed.
How system status bar is displayed when launcher is active
Which device orientation used when displaying this launcher
Display background on a non-adaptive app icons
Generate 16:9 cards for square Android app icons
Legacy app icons in menu will not be updated unless the icon is reloaded by moving the icon in and out of screen\'s top and bottom.
Music volumes for the menu items and multimedia content
Music volume for system e.g: Gameboot, Coldboot
Choose a short menu sound file
Clear the custom menu sound override
Cannot open the selected menu sound file
Cannot create the menu sound override file
What to show underneath of app name
Show additional JVM Memory Usage under FPS Counter

The loader will try to load the icon type in top to bottom order until \"Legacy Icon\" is found, the reason for the Legacy icon limitation is that it always presented by the OS even though the app itself didn\'t supply one, therefore putting Legacy Icon to the topmost effectively disables the other type of icon from being loaded.
If custom icon is available, then it will be used regardless of this priority. Icon must be reloaded before it takes effect.
Set which app icon type to be loaded first before trying to load other type of icon.
Activity %s is not found or is forbidden to be launched by CrossLauncher.
No camera app is available on this device.
No browser app is available on this device.
Cannot open this custom launch item.
Cannot open this file or ROM launch item.
No Play Store or browser app is available on this device.
Account management is not connected yet.
Remote Play is not connected yet.
Internet Radio is not connected yet.
RSS Channel is not connected yet.
Show all open-source components used by this launcher
On TV, Launch TV/Leanback intent and fallback to phone if not found
How the Internet Browser node should open websites
Would you like to delete this shortcut?\n\n%s
App with id \"%1$s\" cannot be moved from category id \"%2$s\" to \"%3$s\". \n\nHowever, app\'s state have been saved, restarting the launcher will put the icon in designated catgeory.
Clear all manual category overrides and restore default app organization.
Clear themes, icon overrides, custom resources, fonts, wallpaper, custom items, and launcher preferences.
This will remove all launcher customizations and restart with default APK assets, similar to a fresh install. Back up your XTF first.
Customization reset complete. Removed %1$d stored entries.
Choose when animated item icons should play
Create or delete custom sub-folders and launch items.
Add custom folders, links, and ROM launch items.
Review or delete custom links and ROM launch items.
Hide built-in nodes or edit supported launch targets.
Are you sure you want to delete this custom launch item?
Use Triangle, then Set Emulator App for this ROM.
App list is still loading. Try again in a moment.
Are you sure you want to delete this node? Apps inside will be moved back to the main category.
Delete this built-in node from the current node list?
A node with this ID already exists.
You can check and download the update at Settings > System Update\nor you can open the GitHub Release page and download from there
Media listing and media item behaviour
Whether the launcher can access media on this device
Failed to load requested system BGM
Cannot find destination directory, this might be due to system error
Source file empty, either due to picker app\'s error or overly enforced system security
App cannot find source file. This might be due to picker\'s fault or overly enforced system security
Music volumes for menu background (if loaded)
Pick Audio file for menu music that is always playing in background
Would you like to delete \"%s\" ?\n\nThis operation cannot be undone.

This launcher cannot open setting page for %1$s. 
 
Reason : %2$s 
 
Would you like to open the main Settings page instead so you can access manually?
Open non-existent Setting page, test for devices with incomplete settings
Now Closing…\n\nIf dialog not closing soon, press Confirm or Cancel
This should trigger same effect as when Android have settings entry but not the actual implementation.
Is launcher allowed to access Android Notification
Export log file to storage ( using Android Storage Scope )
How side menu should be navigated on touch screen
Customise the look and feel of the launcher
Choose a .ttf or .otf font for launcher text
Change the icons for categories and system nodes
Are you sure you want to reset all manual shell icon overrides?
Package current launcher settings, assets, and customization into an XTF file
Restore launcher settings, assets, and customization from an XTF file
Choose an image for the launcher-only wallpaper layer
Clear the launcher-only wallpaper and reveal the device wallpaper
Choose the launcher startup image override
Choose the launcher startup audio override
Clear custom coldboot image and audio overrides
Cannot create the coldboot override file
Cannot open the selected coldboot file
Coldboot audio must be 10 seconds or shorter
Choose the app-launch gameboot image, GIF, or MP4 override
Choose the app-launch gameboot audio override
Clear custom gameboot image and audio overrides
Import or reset launcher fonts, wallpapers, boot media, sounds, and shell icons
Import or export portable theme and customization packages
Import or reset the launcher UI font
Import or reset the launcher-only wallpaper layer
Import or reset startup image and audio overrides
Import or reset app-launch visual and audio overrides
Import or reset core cursor, confirm, and cancel sounds
Import or reset top-right status HUD assets
Choose the default label used for storage-root nodes
Choose a transparent battery frame image override
Clear the custom battery glyph override
Cannot create the battery glyph override file
Cannot open the selected battery glyph file
Cannot create the gameboot override file
Cannot open the selected gameboot file
Animated icons must be GIF, APNG, or WebP
Animated icon file is too large. Maximum size is %1$d MB.
